properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The night Is dark my heart is weak I've lost my way my soul can't speak Tears keep falling drowning me Oh Lord where could you be

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I have wandered far from grace Felt the silence in this place But even now through all my pain I call your name again

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord I need you now, I need you near Take my sorrow, take my fear Lift me up from this deep sea Jesus have mercy on me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The world is loud but I feel alone A broken heart, a heart of stone If you are here then show me light Hold me close through this long night

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I have wandered far from grace Felt the silence in this place But even now through all my pain I call your name again

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Lord I need you now, I need you near Take my sorrow, take my fear Lift me up from this deep sea Jesus have mercy on me

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Even in the Valley you are God Even in my Weakness you are Strong Through my Tears I Lift my Hands I will trust your perfect plan

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Lord I need you now, I need you near Take my sorrow, take my fear Lift me up from this deep sea Jesus have mercy on me

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: You are Faithful you are True Even when I cannot see In my Darkness still I'll Sing Jesus, Jesus you're everything
